scripts.dev: npm run build -w @vtt-core/shared && npm run build:content && concurrently -n shared,content,server,client -c gray,magenta,blue,green "npm run dev -w @vtt-core/shared" "npm run dev:content" "npm run dev -w @vtt-core/server" "npm run dev -w @vtt-core/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @vtt-core/shared && npm run build:content && npm run build -w @vtt-core/server && npm run build -w @vtt-core/client
scripts.dev:cf: npm run build -w @vtt-core/shared && npm run build:content && npm run build -w @vtt-core/client && npm run sync-maps:local -w @vtt-core/cf-worker && concurrently -n shared,content,client,cf -c gray,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @vtt-core/shared" "npm run dev:content" "VITE_CF_DEV=1 npm run dev -w @vtt-core/client" "npm run dev -w @vtt-core/cf-worker"
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build -w @vtt-core/shared && npm run build:content && npm run build -w @vtt-core/client && npm run deploy -w @vtt-core/cf-worker
scripts.test: npm run test -w @vtt-core/shared && npm run test -w @vtt-core/client
scripts.test:e2e: E2E_CLIENT_URL=http://localhost:5174 E2E_API_URL=http://localhost:3002 PORT=3002 npm run test:e2e -w @vtt-core/e2e
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
